title: Good Luck!
description: Good Luck gives purpose to the luck mechanic by making loot tables more influenced by luck and by making the Potion of Luck accessible.
body: # What is Good Luck? Good Luck gives purpose to the luck mechanic by making loot tables more influenced by luck and by making the Potion of Luck accessible. The mod changes loot tables to make greater use of the quality value, which is now tied to how valuable the loot is. The quality value increases the chance of getting certain items based on the player’s luck stat — so better luck means better loot. This also applies to the unluck effect, which gives the player negative luck, resulting in worse loot. Good Luck also works with other mods that use the quality value.   ## Updates status: Since I am the only developer of this mod, development is a bit slow, so don’t expect too many updates. If I ever stop development, I will make sure to announce it here. If you want dates for updates, balancing changes, furture plans for the mod or report any bugs, you can join the discord here: [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555ddad1f2ca3d8ae78597925da2038b3e1349a4.png)](https://discord.gg/vBCfabYUsR)
